languages.text: "Проктор Адриана Йегер, аванпост T-M/255. Приветствуем Вольного Торговца". {n}К вам обращается седая женщина — совсем еще не старуха, но, видимо, ее жизнь была достаточно тяжелой, чтобы седина преждевременно тронула волосы.{/n}

"Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Проктор Адриана Йегер, аванпост T-M/255. Приветствуем Вольного Торговца". {n}Убеленная сединой женщина обращается к вам сухим, бесцветным голосом. Она совсем еще не старуха, но нечто словно вытравило из нее все краски и эмоции, оставив только необходимый для несения службы минимум.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, gray-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, sparing the bare minimum necessary for duty.{/n}

"Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}

languages.text: «Procuradora Adriana Yeager, puesto avanzado T-M/255. Saludos, Comerciante Independiente». {n}Una mujer delgada de cabello gris te recibe con voz seca y neutral. Dista mucho de ser una anciana, pero parece que algo le ha arrebatado todo color y emoción, dejando solo el mínimo necesario para que cumpla su función.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Procuradora Adriana Yeager, puesto avanzado T-M/255. Saludos, Comerciante Independiente». {n}Una mujer delgada de cabello gris te recibe con voz seca y neutral. Dista mucho de ser una anciana, pero parece que algo le ha arrebatado todo color y emoción, dejando solo el mínimo necesario para que cumpla su función.{/n}

languages.text: “阿德里亚娜·耶格尔监察官，T-M/255号哨站。向你致意，行商浪人。”{n}一位头发花白、身材瘦削的女性以毫无起伏的音调开了口， 听起来干巴巴的。尽管她并不老迈，但似乎有什么东西耗尽了她所有的色彩与情感，只留下最低限度的生机，用来履行职责。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “阿德里亚娜·耶格尔监察官，T-M/255号哨站。向你致意，行商浪人。”{n}一位头发花白、身材瘦削的女性以毫无起伏的音调开了口， 听起来干巴巴的。尽管她并不老迈，但似乎有什么东西耗尽了她所有的色彩与情感，只留下最低限度的生机，用来履行职责。{/n}

languages.text: 「代理人アドリアナ・イェーガー、前哨基地T-M/255。こんにちは、ローグトレーダー」{n}痩せた灰色の髪の女性が乾いた特徴のない声であなたに話しかける。彼女は年老いているとは言いがたいが、すべての色や感情が抜け落ちて、彼女の役割を果たすために必要最低限のものしか残っていないように見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「代理人アドリアナ・イェーガー、前哨基地T-M/255。こんにちは、ローグトレーダー」{n}痩せた灰色の髪の女性が乾いた特徴のない声であなたに話しかける。彼女は年老いているとは言いがたいが、すべての色や感情が抜け落ちて、彼女の役割を果たすために必要最低限のものしか残っていないように見える。{/n}

languages.text: « Proctor Adriana Yeager, avant-poste T-M/255. Salutations, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. » {n}Une femme élancée aux cheveux grisonnants s'adresse à vous d'une voix sèche et monocorde. Elle est encore relativement jeune, mais quelque chose semble l'avoir vidée de sa substance et de ses émotions pour ne laisser dans son sillage que le strict minimum nécessaire à sa mission.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Proctor Adriana Yeager, avant-poste T-M/255. Salutations, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. » {n}Une femme élancée aux cheveux grisonnants s'adresse à vous d'une voix sèche et monocorde. Elle est encore relativement jeune, mais quelque chose semble l'avoir vidée de sa substance et de ses émotions pour ne laisser dans son sillage que le strict minimum nécessaire à sa mission.{/n}

languages.text: "Karakol T-M/255'ten ben Üsteğmen Adriana Yeager. Selamlar Hür Tacir." {n}Zayıf, kır saçlı bir kadın; ruhsuz bir ses tonuyla sana hitap ediyor. Kadın pek de yaşlı değil ancak görünüşe göre bir şey, içindeki tüm hayat enerjisini sömürmüş ve geriye bir tek görevini ifa etmek için zaruri olan asgari unsurlar kalmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Karakol T-M/255'ten ben Üsteğmen Adriana Yeager. Selamlar Hür Tacir." {n}Zayıf, kır saçlı bir kadın; ruhsuz bir ses tonuyla sana hitap ediyor. Kadın pek de yaşlı değil ancak görünüşe göre bir şey, içindeki tüm hayat enerjisini sömürmüş ve geriye bir tek görevini ifa etmek için zaruri olan asgari unsurlar kalmış.{/n}

languages.text: "Proktorin Adriana Yeager, Außenposten T-M/255. "Ich grüße Euch, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. {n}Eine hagere Frau mit grauem Haar begrüßt dich mit ausdrucksloser Stimme. Sie ist eigentlich nicht alt, aber irgendetwas scheint ihr jede Farbe und Emotion geraubt und nur das Minimum dessen zurückgelassen zu haben, das sie braucht, um ihre Pflicht zu erfüllen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Proctor Adriana Yeager, outpost T-M/255. Greetings, Rogue Trader." {n}A thin, grey-haired woman addresses you in a dry, featureless voice. She is hardly ancient, but something appears to have drained her of all colour and emotion, leaving only the bare minimum necessary to perform her duty.{/n}
